name: Sefirot Shards
short_description: A collectible card RPG set in a fantasy world. Turn-based PVP battles on the arena against real opponents and vast locations for battling monsters. Collect a squad, level up your hero, and uncover all the secrets of Sefirot!
detailed_description:
Card-based combat
Build your deck by acquiring new units and hero magical cards.
Achieve synergy between your units, add a touch of hero magic, and use your strategist talent to win!

Heroes from Legends
Upgrade your hero's talents, equip them with legendary armor, and learn and enhance their magical abilities!
Develop and perfect your unit skills. Collect runes and enhance equipment.

PVP Arena
Fight with other players for a spot in Olympus. Prove that you're the best in this world!

Story campaign
An exciting story that immerses you in the world of Sefirot. Many characters and quests, daily tasks, and all that jazz.
Explore locations, fight enemies, and search for treasures!

supported_languages: English, Russian, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, German, Korean, French, Japanese, Portuguese - Brazil
